---
title: "English Links of Foreign Forging, or, \'The Lady with the Long Nose\'"
---

## English Links of Foreign Forging, or, \'The Lady with the Long Nose\'

**Author:** Augusta Frederica Frere
**Date:** 1871-1873
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (January 1871-September 1873)

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
